article.title: Musk Vies to Turn X Into Super App With Banking Tool Near Launch
article.summary: More than three years after acquiring Twitter, Elon Musk says he’s nearing his long-stated goal of turning it into an “everything app” with a new financial services tool that he pledged to launch for the public this month.
article.title_zh: Musk 力圖將 X 打造為超級應用，銀行工具即將上線
article.summary_zh: 在收購 Twitter 逾三年後，Elon Musk 表示即將實現他的長期目標，推出新的金融服務工具，並承諾在本月向公眾開放。

article.title: Beijing Warns EU After China Firms Included in Russia Sanctions
article.summary: China said it will take necessary measures after the European Union added Chinese entities to its latest Russia sanctions package, warning that all consequences would be borne by the EU.
article.title_zh: 中國對歐盟將中國公司納入俄羅斯制裁後發出警告
article.summary_zh: 歐盟將中國實體添加到最新俄羅斯制裁名單後，中國表示將採取必要措施，並警告歐盟將承擔所有後果。

article.title: Canadian Province of Manitoba Says It Will Ban Social Media, AI For Youth
article.summary: The Canadian province of Manitoba plans to prohibit young people from accessing social media and artificial intelligence chatbots, its leader said.
article.title_zh: 加拿大曼尼托巴省宣布將禁止青少年使用社群媒體和AI
article.summary_zh: 加拿大曼尼托巴省領導人表示，該省計劃禁止年輕人使用社群媒體和人工智慧聊天機器人。

article.title: The debugging wars: Cursor 3 takes aim at Claude Code’s agentic edge
article.summary: The Cursor we’ve come to know and love has always been an IDE with AI assistance . Working with Cursor gave a similar look and feel to working with IDEs of days gone by ( VS Code , JetBrains, etc). On April 2, 2026 Cursor 3 launched with its dedicated Agents Window . The Agents Window is a standalone interface where the user can describe a task to an agent and the agent should be able to execute the task completely. Sound familiar?  Cursor’s new Agent Window looks almost identical to Claude Code (Anthropic’s terminal-based coding agent) and other AI chatbot interfaces. This didn’t happen by accident. In my opinion, this was done as a direct response to Anthropic  (Claude Code) shipping code interfaces that do what Cursor does without the middleware layer.
article.title_zh: 除錯戰爭：Cursor 3 對標 Claude Code 的智能體優勢
article.summary_zh: Cursor 一直是提供 AI 協助的 IDE，提供類似 VS Code 和 JetBrains 等傳統 IDE 的體驗。2026年4月2日，Cursor 3 推出專有的 Agents Window，這是一項重大功能創新。

article.title: Google Photos AI Enhance is now live for all users
article.summary: Google seems to be working hard on expanding its editing options in Google Photos. We recently saw the online titan add a quick facial touch-up feature. Now another similar feature has gone live. It is a very simple and straightforward “AI Enhance” button that sits beside the Enhance and Dynamic buttons that were already present in the Auto tab in the image editor. We tried it for ourselves, and while it can restore highlights and shadows quite effectively and deal with common issues caused by bad lighting and boost colors slightly, it is nothing truly spectacular in any way....
article.title_zh: Google Photos AI Enhance 功能現已面向所有使用者上線
article.summary_zh: Google 持續擴展 Google Photos 的編輯選項，新增簡單易用的 AI Enhance 按鈕功能。

article.title: Chernobyl virus turned 27 today, and it could brick your PC in ways modern malware can't by overwriting BIOS firmware
article.summary: 27 years ago today, on April 26, 1999, a 1 KB virus called CIH detonated its payload on hundreds of thousands of Windows 9x machines worldwide.
article.title_zh: Chernobyl病毒今天滿27歲，它可以通過覆蓋BIOS韌體以現代惡意軟體無法實現的方式毀壞您的PC
article.summary_zh: 27年前的今天（1999年4月26日），一個1KB的CIH病毒在全球數十萬台Windows 9x機器上引爆。

article.title: DeepSeek launches 1.6 trillion parameter V4 on Huawei chips as U.S. escalates AI theft accusations — U.S. gov't alleges IP theft by DeepSeek and other Chinese AI firms
article.summary: DeepSeek on Friday released a preview of its V4 large language model, the Hangzhou-based startup's most powerful to date.
article.title_zh: DeepSeek在華為晶片上推出1.6兆參數V4，美國升級AI盜竊指控——美國政府指控DeepSeek和其他中國AI公司竊取智慧財產權
article.summary_zh: 杭州新創公司DeepSeek週五發佈了其最強大的大型語言模型V4的預覽版。

article.title: Beyond prompting: How KubeStellar reached 81% PR acceptance with AI agents
article.summary: The surprise in building KubeStellar Console with coding agents was not the extent of the model’s capabilities, but the heavy lifting the surrounding codebase had to perform. In mid-December, I started building KubeStellar Console from scratch. It’s a multi-cluster management dashboard for Kubernetes, and it sits inside the KubeStellar project in the Cloud Native Computing Foundation (CNCF) Sandbox. The stack is Go on the back end, React and TypeScript on the front, and Helm for packaging. No team. Just me and two AI coding agents running in parallel terminal sessions. The first two weeks were the honeymoon that everyone in this space seems to describe. Code came out of the agents faster than I could read it. Things I’d have budgeted three days for showed up in two hours.
article.title_zh: 超越提示詞：KubeStellar如何利用AI代理達到81%的PR接受率
article.summary_zh: 使用編碼代理構建KubeStellar Console時的驚人之處不在於模型能力的範圍，而在於周圍代碼庫必須執行的繁重工作。

article.title: Intel's upcoming Xeon 7 "Diamond Rapids" server CPUs reportedly delayed to 2027 — Next-gen Coral Rapids lineup lands 2028 but can be accelerated, according to new leak
article.summary: Diamond Rapids, also known as Xeon 7, was supposed to launch later this year, but a new leak from Jaykihn claims the timeline has now moved to 2027. Clearwater Forest, the E-core-only successor to Sierra Forest, is set to release in the first half of this year, while the next-gen Coral Rapids family is reportedly planned for 2028.
article.title_zh: Intel 即將推出的 Xeon 7「Diamond Rapids」伺服器 CPU 據報延期至 2027 年 — 下一代 Coral Rapids 系列定於 2028 年推出但可加速上市，根據新洩露
article.summary_zh: 原定於今年晚些時候推出的 Xeon 7（Diamond Rapids）據新洩露消息稱現已延期至 2027 年。E-core 專用的 Clearwater Forest（Sierra Forest 的後繼者）預計將於今年上半年發佈，而下一代 Coral Rapids 系列將於 2028 年推出。

article.title: What new Google Messages features are rolling out [April 2026]
article.summary: Like other Google apps, Messages for Android A/B tests many features. It can take the RCS/SMS client a rather long time to actually launch new functionality in stable. From various reports, Google announcements , and devices we’ve checked, this is the current state of Messages. more…
article.title_zh: Google Messages 新功能正在推出【2026年4月】
article.summary_zh: Google Messages for Android 進行多項功能 A/B 測試，這些新功能最終推出至穩定版需要較長時間。
